name: image-drop-input
description: Product-safe React image input for preview, validation, compression, paste, and signed uploads.

scripts.clean: rm -rf dist coverage examples/vite/dist examples/rsbuild/dist examples/rsbuild/.rsbuild
scripts.clean:share: rm -rf node_modules dist coverage examples/vite/dist examples/rsbuild/dist examples/rsbuild/.rsbuild
scripts.build:lib: tsdown && node -e "import { copyFileSync, mkdirSync } from 'node:fs'; mkdirSync('dist', { recursive: true }); copyFileSync('src/style.css', 'dist/style.css'); copyFileSync('src/core/style-css.d.ts', 'dist/style.css.d.ts');"
scripts.build:examples: npm run build --workspace examples/vite && npm run build --workspace examples/rsbuild
scripts.build:pages: GITHUB_PAGES=true npm run build --workspace examples/vite && node scripts/prepare-pages-artifact.mjs
scripts.build: npm run clean && npm run build:lib && npm run build:examples
scripts.verify: npm run typecheck && npm test && npm run build:examples && npm run check:package
scripts.release:pr:check: npm run verify && npm run publish:check
scripts.typecheck:examples: npm run typecheck --workspace examples/vite && npm run typecheck --workspace examples/rsbuild
scripts.typecheck: tsc -p tsconfig.json --noEmit && npm run build:lib && npm run typecheck:examples
scripts.check:package: npm run build:lib && publint && node scripts/run-attw-pack-check.mjs
